ogTitle: Jewells vs Jews Lagoon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jewells and Jews Lagoon.
heading: Jewells vs Jews Lagoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jewells, New South Wales and Jews Lagoon, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jews Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Jewells (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jewells or Jews Lagoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jewells has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Jews Lagoon scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jewells scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Jews Lagoon scores 36/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jewells or Jews Lagoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jews Lagoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.62% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
